# @efficientlabs/stratos

StratosAgent — your sovereign, local-first AI agent. Runs on your hardware (local or BYOK); The Atmosphere mesh is an optional add-on.

## Install
```sh
npm i -g @efficientlabs/stratos@1.0.0
stratos --help
```

This package contains no fabricated status or metrics; commands report only what they measure.
_Assembled from the Efficient Labs private upstream — see `provenance.json` for the source commit._
